positive: A stylized, highly contrasting illustration of a majestic, roaring mythical griffin perched on geometric crystalline rocks. The griffin has powerful, clean silhouettes, vibrant cyan and gold plumage accents, and intense, glowing emerald eyes. The composition is centrally focused and highly symmetrical, set against a deep midnight blue and starlit gradient background. Use bold line art, linocut printing style, and limited, complementary color palette for maximum print visibility. Emblematic, high detail, clean vector aesthetic, tarot card style, flat composition, suitable for repeat apparel printing.
